Game: James Pond 3 - Operation Starfish 1994 No mission too dangerous, no location too hostile, James Pond is FISH's top secret agent. A master of disguise who rubs out enemies with a swish of a fin. Pond is about to start his most difficult mission to date... Operation Starfi5h.
